t1.quote: PostCommander has saved me 10+ hours per week on content creation. I used to spend all morning writing posts - now I generate a week's worth in 15 minutes.

t2.quote: Managing 6 social platforms was a nightmare. PostCommander generates perfectly optimized content for each one. My engagement is up 300% across all channels.

t3.quote: The writing quality is incredible. My clients think I hired a copywriter. The style cloning feature matches my voice perfectly - nobody can tell it is AI.

faqPreview.title: Frequently asked questions
faqPreview.a1: PostCommander is an AI-powered social media content creation tool. It uses multiple AI models to generate optimized posts for LinkedIn, X, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, and Pinterest.
faqPreview.a2: We support OpenAI GPT-4, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, Mistral, and local Ollama models. Each brings unique strengths for different content types.
faqPreview.a3: Yes! Our free plan includes 10 posts per month, 1 AI provider, and 2 platforms. No credit card required to get started.
faqPreview.q4: Can I use it in multiple languages?
faqPreview.a4: Absolutely. PostCommander supports content generation in 8 languages: English, French, Spanish, German, Portuguese, Arabic, Chinese, and Japanese.

finalCta.title: Ready to transform your social media presence?
finalCta.subtitle: Free plan available. No credit card required. Start generating viral content in seconds.
finalCta.note: No credit card required. Free plan forever.

footer.newsletterDesc: Get weekly tips on AI content creation and social media growth.

pricing.title: Plans that grow with you
pricing.subtitle: Start free and upgrade when you need more. No hidden fees, no surprises.

guarantee.title: Start monthly, cancel anytime
guarantee.desc: Most teams begin on monthly billing, validate the workflow, then switch to annual billing once the rollout is proven.

faq.q1: Can I change my plan at any time?
faq.a1: Yes! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. When upgrading, you will be charged the prorated difference. When downgrading, the remaining credit will be applied to your next billing cycle.
faq.q2: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a2: We accept major credit cards through Stripe for the self-serve checkout flow.
faq.q3: What if I have a billing issue?
faq.a3: Contact support if you run into an unexpected billing problem. Billing questions are reviewed case by case rather than through a blanket refund promise.
faq.q4: Do I need my own API keys?
faq.a4: You can use your own API keys for the AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Mistral) or use our built-in quota which is included in your plan. Bring-your-own-key users get lower costs.
faq.q5: What happens when I reach my post limit?
faq.a5: On the Free plan, you will be notified when approaching your limit. You can upgrade to Pro for unlimited posts at any time. Unused posts do not roll over to the next month.
faq.q6: Can I try Pro features before paying?
faq.a6: Start with the Free plan to validate the basics, then move to monthly Pro or Business billing when you are ready for more features.

pricing.ctaSubtitle: Start with the Free plan and upgrade anytime. No credit card required.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about PostCommander.
faq.ctaSubtitle: Our team is here to help. Contact us and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

general.title: General
general.a1: PostCommander is an AI-powered social media content creation and management platform. It uses multiple leading AI models (GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, Mistral, and Ollama) to generate optimized posts for 6 major social platforms in 8 languages.
general.a2: Simply enter your topic or idea, choose your target platforms and preferred tone, select an AI model, and click Generate. PostCommander creates platform-optimized posts in seconds. You can then edit, schedule, or publish directly.
general.q3: Which social media platforms are supported?
general.a3: PostCommander supports LinkedIn, X (Twitter), Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, and Pinterest. Each post is automatically optimized for the specific requirements of each platform.
general.q4: Do I need technical skills to use it?
general.a4: Not at all! PostCommander is designed for everyone. If you can type a sentence, you can create professional social media content. No coding or technical knowledge required.
general.q5: Can I use PostCommander on mobile?
general.a5: Yes! PostCommander is fully responsive and works beautifully on smartphones, tablets, and desktops.

ai.title: AI & Content Generation
ai.a1:
PostCommander integrates with 5 AI providers:

- OpenAI (GPT-4, GPT-4 Turbo)
- Anthropic (Claude)
- Google (Gemini)
- Mistral
- Ollama (local, free)
ai.a2: The content quality is excellent. Our prompting system is specifically engineered for social media, incorporating best practices for engagement, readability, and platform-specific optimization.
ai.a3: PostCommander supports 8 languages: English, French, Spanish, German, Portuguese, Arabic, Chinese, and Japanese.
ai.a4: Yes. All AI-generated content is original and created specifically for your request. The AI models generate new text each time.
ai.q5: Can the AI match my writing style?
ai.a5: Yes! With Writing Style Cloning (Business plan), you can provide samples and the AI will learn your unique voice.

pricing.title: Pricing & Billing
pricing.q1: Is there really a free plan?
pricing.a1: Absolutely! Our Free plan includes 10 posts per month, 1 AI provider, and 2 platforms. No credit card required.
pricing.q2: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.a2: We accept major credit cards through Stripe for the self-serve checkout flow.
pricing.q3: Can I cancel at any time?
pricing.a3: Yes, cancel anytime with no penalties. Your plan stays active until the end of your billing period.
pricing.q4: What if I have a billing issue?
pricing.a4: Contact support if you hit an unexpected billing issue. Billing questions are reviewed case by case.
pricing.a5: Yes! Upgrade or downgrade at any time. Charges are prorated automatically.
pricing.q6: Do I need my own API keys?
pricing.a6: Paid plans include a usage quota. You can also bring your own API keys for lower per-token costs.

platforms.title: Platforms & Publishing
platforms.q1: How do I connect my accounts?
platforms.a1: Go to Settings > Platform Connections and click Connect for each platform. You will be redirected to authorize through each platform's official OAuth flow.
platforms.a2: Yes! Once connected, publish posts directly from PostCommander. You can also save drafts, schedule, or copy content.
platforms.a3: Yes, with the Business plan. Use the Content Calendar to schedule posts for specific dates and times.
platforms.q4: Does it auto-format for each platform?
platforms.a4: Yes. Each post is automatically optimized for its target platform including character limits, hashtags, and formatting.

security.title: Security & Privacy
security.a1: We store the account, settings, and content data needed to run the product. Sensitive stored secrets are encrypted, and internal operational tooling is restricted to authenticated admins.
security.a2: Yes. API keys are encrypted and only used for AI provider requests. Never logged or displayed in full.
security.q3: Can I export or delete my account data?
security.a3: Yes. The settings page includes a self-serve JSON export and a permanent account deletion flow for active application data. Contact support for additional privacy requests.
security.q4: Can I use it without cloud AI?
security.a4: Yes! Ollama integration lets you run AI models locally. Your content never leaves your computer.
security.a5: Only authenticated users on the account can access stored content. We do not sell your generated content or use it as marketing collateral.
